title: vittadinia dissecta var. hirta
intro: Vittadinia dissecta var. hirta, commonly known as New South Wales daisy or Woolly New South Wales daisy, is a plant species native to Australia. It is a shrub-like herb with medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and offering protection against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Vittadinia dissecta var. hirta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to support overall well-being and address various health conditions.
